query:
SELECT tm.id, tm.name, tm.teamRole,
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM calls c WHERE c.teamMemberId = tm.id AND c.status = 'completed') as graded_calls,
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM badge_progress bp WHERE bp.teamMemberId = tm.id) as progress_count,
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_badges ub WHERE ub.teamMemberId = tm.id) as badges_earned
FROM team_members tm 
WHERE tm.name LIKE '%Kyle%';
command:

       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM badge_progress bp WHERE bp.teamMemberId = tm.id) as progress_count,
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_badges ub WHERE ub.teamMemberId = tm.id) as badges_earned
FROM team_members tm
